title: 331pcs 50mm Wet Dry Hook and Loop Sanding Discs 60-10000 Grit Sandpaper for Drill Sanding Attachment, Backing Pads Polishing Kit for Resin Wood Jewelry Metal
features: Complete Sanding Kit: Package includes 320 pieces of 50mm wet dry sandpaper grit 60 to 10000 each 20 pieces, 2 x different hardness polishing pads, 1 x wool pad, 2 x drill sanding pad, 2 x foam sponge pads, 1 x 1/8" metal shank, 3 x 1/4" metal shank，total 331 pcs

Silicon Carbide Sanding Discs: Engineered with high-performance silicon carbide grains for ultra-fast material removal power. These 2 inch sanding discs deliver professional-grade results on all surfaces, with wet/dry versatility to reduce dust or extend abrasive life.

Multi-Tool Compatibility: Featuring 4 specialized adapter rods, this sanding kit works seamlessly with electric drills, rotary tools, and pneumatic sanders for ultimate versatility. Includes all necessary attachments for instant compatibility right out of the box.

Wide Material Compatibility:This professional sanding kit delivers flawless results on auto bodies, woodwork, metals, plastics, glass, and ceramics—handling everything from heavy stock removal to delicate finish work. Perfect for detail sanding curves, polishing glass edges, refinishing car panels, or crafting resin art.

Quick-Change Efficiency: Experience tool-free sandpaper swaps in seconds with our high-grip hook & loop backing—the fastest way to switch between grits or materials. The backing holds discs securely during aggressive sanding yet releases instantly when needed.
